race.comment: DECALOGUE (3) rewarded for his consistency when he got off the mark at start eight with a dominant win over 1850m at Newcastle. Confidence is high and worth noting he finished fourth in the G2 Tulloch three-starts back. Can go on with it here out to the 2000m. SUNSPRITE (11) progressive filly who was just over a month between runs when she launched late from last on the turn with a narrow third over 1800m at this track. Fitter now and can race a touch closer from the good gate. Hard to hold out with the claim. EYNESBURY (8) over-raced in a slowly run contest and held up in the straight with an unlucky sixth over 1800m here. Ready for this trip and deserves another chance. AGENT ZERO (1) proved the Canberra win was no fluke when he repeated the dose from the inside gate to score a tough victory over 1800m at this track in BM72 grade. Doesn't get the same set-up here and not to be underestimated with the 2kg weight rise. TEQUISODA (4) jumps in grade and trip third-up and keep safe.
